summary: Iteration 163 - Case Export Pack PDF and Multi-Language Translation features tested. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/languages returns 41 supported languages including common ones (es, fr, de, zh, ja, ko, ar, hi, vi, th)
GET /api/cases/{case_id}/export/case-pack returns PDF (339KB+) for case with reports, 404 for case without reports
POST /api/cases/{case_id}/translate correctly rejects 'en' language with 400 error
POST /api/cases/{case_id}/translate correctly rejects invalid language codes with 400 error
POST /api/cases/{case_id}/translate accepts valid request and returns translated content
QuickExport dialog shows 'Download Case Export Pack (PDF)' button prominently at top
QuickExport dialog shows ZIP download option below PDF option
ReportTranslator component renders Translate button in ReportView header toolbar
ReportTranslator component renders Translate button in BarristerView header toolbar
Translate dialog opens with searchable language list when Translate button is clicked
Language search filters languages correctly (tested with 'Spanish')
All endpoints require authentication (401 returned without token)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing case_f8bf63e9dcbe (Homann v R) with reports
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 163 verified two new features: (1) Case Export Pack PDF at GET /api/cases/{case_id}/export/case-pack generates a formatted PDF with all completed reports, grounds, timeline, and disclaimers. (2) Multi-Language Translation at POST /api/cases/{case_id}/translate with GET /api/languages for supported languages list. The translate_router is registered separately from export_router in server.py. Frontend components QuickExport.jsx and ReportTranslator.jsx are working correctly. Translate button appears in both ReportView and BarristerView header toolbars.

get_languages_endpoint.details: Returns 41 supported languages with code and name fields

case_export_pack_pdf.details: Returns PDF for case with reports (339KB+), 404 for case without reports

translate_endpoint_validation.details: Rejects 'en' language, rejects invalid codes, requires report_id and language

translate_endpoint_success.details: Accepts valid request and returns translated_content, language, language_name

quick_export_dialog_pdf_button.details: Download Case Export Pack (PDF) button prominently displayed at top of dialog

quick_export_dialog_zip_option.details: ZIP download option with checkboxes displayed below PDF option

report_view_translate_button.details: Translate button present in ReportView header toolbar next to Export PDF

barrister_view_translate_button.details: Translate button present in BarristerView header toolbar next to Quick Brief

translate_dialog_language_search.details: Searchable language list with search input and language options

authentication_required.details: All endpoints return 401 without authentication token
